subject: History
chapter_name: Weavers, Iron Smelters and Factory Owners
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the importance of the Indian textile industry
Learn about the work of Indian weavers
Understand the role of iron smelters
Identify reasons for the decline of traditional industries
Learn about the rise of factory industries
Understand how industrialization changed traditional occupations

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Indian Textile Industry
topics_covered: Role of weaving in the economy
student_activities: List types of fabrics produced in India
Discuss why Indian textiles were famous worldwide

lesson_plan.title: Indian Weavers and Their Work
student_activities: Write steps involved in weaving cloth

lesson_plan.title: Decline of Traditional Weaving
student_activities: List two problems faced by Indian weavers
Discuss how factory cloth affected handloom weaving

lesson_plan.title: Iron Smelters and Their Work
student_activities: Write the steps involved in iron smelting
Discuss the importance of iron tools in daily life

lesson_plan.title: Rise of Factory Industries
student_activities: List differences between handloom and factory production
Write two advantages of factory production

lesson_plan.title: Industrial Changes and Chapter Revision
student_activities: List two effects of industrialization on workers

teacher_tip: Use pictures of handlooms, weaving processes, and textile mills to help students clearly understand the difference between traditional and modern production methods.
